name: Pan-Roasted Potatoes with Whole Mustard Seeds
recipeIngredient: 3 cups potato chunks, such as russets or red (unpeeled)
recipeInstructions:
Preparation - 10 minutes
1. Parboil the potatoes for 5-6 minutes in a pot of boiling water and drain. They should be firm yet slightly tender.
2. Heat the oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add the bay leaf and mustard seeds and sauté until the seeds begin to pop. Add the onion and lower the heat to medium.
3. Add the potatoes and continue to sauté, stirring constantly, until they start to turn crispy. Add the paprika and continue to sauté for a few more minutes.
4. Add the seasonings and toss to coat the potatoes. Cook for another few minutes. Remove the bay leaf and serve.
Note: The recipe is from "Memorable Menus Made Easy" by Robyn Webb, M.S., published by NTC/Contemporary Publishing in 1997 (ISBN: 0-945448-82-1).
